hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Na makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.identify_3_structures_in_the_spotter_t: Gano gine-gine 3 a cikin Gwajin Spotter
hausa.unlock_3_anatomical_mnemonics: Buɗe alamomin tunawa na jikin ɗan adam 3
hausa.comparative_anatomist: Masani a Kwatancen Jikin Ɗan Adam
hausa.206_bones_support_protection_movement_: Ƙasusuwa 206 — tallafi, kariya, motsi, ajiyar ma’adinai, ƙirƙirar jini.
hausa.houses_meninges_brain_and_cranial_nerv: Yana ɗauke da meninges, ƙwaƙwalwa, da ramukan jijiyoyin kwanya. Ɗinke (coronal, sagittal, lambdoid) suna haɗuwa sa’ad da yaro ya kai shekara 2.
hausa.600_muscles_movement_posture_heat_prod: Tsokoki 600+ — motsi, tsayuwa, ƙirƙirar zafi, daidaita gaɓoɓi.
hausa.heart_60_000_miles_of_vessels_5l_of_bl: Zuciya, mil 60,000 na jijiyoyi, lita 5 na jini — tana kai O₂, abinci mai gina jiki, hormones; tana cire shara.
hausa.cns_brain_spinal_cord_and_pns_31_spina: CNS (ƙwaƙwalwa + kashin baya) da PNS (nau’i 31 na jijiyoyin baya, nau’i 12 na jijiyoyin kwanya, tsarin jijiya mai sarrafa kansa).
hausa.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Barci mafi sauƙi — sauyi daga farkawa. Motsin idanu a hankali, ƙarfin tsoka yana raguwa. Girgizar hypnic (motsin myoclonic) na kowa. Ana farkar da sauƙi. Manyan raƙuman vertex suna bayyana a EEG.
hausa.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Barci na gaskiya yana farawa. Zafin cikin jiki yana sauka, bugun zuciya yana raguwa. Sleep spindles (fashewar thalamocortical) suna kare barci da ƙarfafa ƙwaƙwalwar motsi. K-complexes manyan raƙuma ne masu amsa abubuwan waje.
hausa.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Barci mai zurfi/na raƙuma masu jinkiri (SWS). Matakin mai maido da ƙarfi sosai. Fitar hormone na girma tana kaiwa kololuwa. Tsarin glymphatic yana tsaftace sharar ƙwaƙwalwa (amyloid-β). Ƙarfafa ƙwaƙwalwar bayyanawa yana faruwa. Mafi wahalar farkawa; nauyin barci idan an farkar.
hausa.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Matakin mafarki. Ƙwaƙwalwa tana aiki sosai (kamar farkawa) amma jiki ya shanye (atonia ta hanyar hanawar tushen kwakwalwa na jijiyoyin motsi). Motsin idanu masu sauri da daidaituwa. Sarrafa ƙwaƙwalwar motsin rai da warware matsala ta ƙirƙira. Zagayoyin suna tsawaita yayin da dare ke ci gaba.
hausa.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Yankunan Brodmann suna zana yankuna 52 na tsarin sel. Babban bawon motsi (yanki 4), babban bawon ji na jiki (yanki 3,1,2), babban bawon gani (yanki 17), babban bawon ji (yanki 41,42). Bawon prefrontal shi ne na ƙarshe da ke samun myelin (~shekara 25).
hausa.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Selolin Purkinje na cikin manyan jijiyoyi, kowanne yana karɓar kimanin 200,000 na shigar synaptic. Bawon cerebellar yana da yadudduka 3: molecular, Purkinje, granular. Sabon bincike yana nuna rawar da suke takawa a fahimta, motsin rai, da harshe.
hausa.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Yana ɗauke da nuclei na jijiyoyin kwanya III–XII. Tsarin reticular activating (RAS) shi ne "maɓallin kunna" na ƙwaƙwalwa — lalacewa tana haddasa suma. Ratsawar piramid a medulla: haɗuwar motsi tana bayyana sarrafa motsi na gefen gaba.
hausa.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Sake kunna ƙwaƙwalwa lokacin barci: jijiyoyin hippocampal suna "sake kunna" abubuwan da suka faru da rana lokacin barcin N3, suna canja ƙwaƙwalwa zuwa neocortex. Selolin grid a bawon entorhinal suna ba selolin wuri na hippocampal alkiblar sarari.
hausa.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Hanyar koyar da tsoro: bawon ji → amygdala na gefe → amygdala na tsakiya → hypothalamus (amsar damuwa) + PAG (daskarewa). Mu’amalar amygdala-prefrontal tana ba da damar sarrafa motsin rai — tushen maganin CBT.
hausa.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Muhimman nuclei: VPL/VPM (mika ji na jiki), LGN (mika gani zuwa V1), MGN (mika ji zuwa A1), pulvinar (hankali), rukunin nuclei na gaba (ƙwaƙwalwa, da’irar Papez).
hausa.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Misalin thermostat: hypothalamus na gaba yana haddasa sanyaya (faɗaɗa jijiyoyi, gumi); hypothalamus na baya yana haddasa ɗumama (rawar jiki, matsewar jijiyoyi). Zazzaɓi = ɗagattar matakin da prostaglandins ke yi daga kamuwa da cuta.
hausa.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Gwaje-gwajen raba ƙwaƙwalwa sun bayyana ƙwarewar sassan biyu: sashe na hagu = harshe, dabaru; sashe na dama = sarrafa sarari, na gaba ɗaya. Bayanin da aka nuna wa filin gani ɗaya ana sarrafa shi ta sashe na gefen gaba.
hausa.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine daga substantia nigra yana sarrafa hanyoyin kai tsaye (D1, mai kuzari) da na kaikaice (D2, mai hanawa). Rasa wannan sarrafawa a Parkinson yana haddasa wahalar fara motsi ta musamman.
hausa.returns_interstitial_fluid_absorbs_die: Yana mayar da ruwan tsakanin sel, yana shan kitsen abinci, sa ido na garkuwar jiki — ƙwayoyin lymph 600–700, thymus, saifa.
hausa.major_visceral_organs_respiration_dige: Manyan gabobin ciki — numfashi, narkewa, tacewa, tsarin endocrine.
hausa.skin_largest_organ_2m_hair_nails_gland: Fata (gaɓa mafi girma, ~2m²), gashi, farce, glandoji — shinge, sarrafa zafi, ji, ƙirƙirar bitamin D.
hausa.oxygen_delivery_and_co_removal_12_20_b: Kai iskar oxygen da cire CO₂ — numfashi ~12–20 a minti, iska ~6L a minti, alveoli miliyan 300.
hausa.hormone_producing_glands_regulate_meta: Glandojin da ke fitar da hormone — suna sarrafa metabolism, girma, haihuwa, damuwa, homeostasis ta manzannin sinadarai.
hausa.male_and_female_reproductive_organs_ga: Gabobin haihuwa na namiji da mace — ƙirƙirar gametes, hadi, girman tayi, sarrafa hormone.
hausa.the_circulatory_system_delivers_deoxyg: Tsarin zagayawar jini yana kai jinin da ba shi da oxygen zuwa huhu, inda tsarin numfashi ke cika shi da oxygen da kuma fitar da carbon dioxide ta bakin ganin alveoli-capillary.
hausa.motor_neurons_from_the_nervous_system_: Jijiyoyin motsi daga tsarin jijiya suna fitar da acetylcholine a mahaɗar jijiya da tsoka, suna haddasa matsewar zaren tsoka. Ba tare da alamun jijiya ba, tsokoki ba za su iya motsi ba.
hausa.muscles_attach_to_bones_via_tendons_an: Tsokoki suna manne wa ƙasusuwa ta tendons kuma suna jawo ƙetare gaɓoɓi, suna ƙirƙirar tsarin lever. Ƙashin jiki yana ba da lever masu ƙarfi; tsokoki suna ba da ƙarfin jawowa.
hausa.the_hypothalamus_pituitary_axis_releas: Layin hypothalamus-pituitary yana fitar da FSH da LH da ke sarrafa gabobin haihuwa. Estrogen, progesterone, da testosterone daga gabobin haihuwa suna mayar da amsa ga tsarin endocrine.
hausa.immune_defense_and_fluid_balance: Kariyar Garkuwar Jiki da Daidaiton Ruwa
hausa.the_lymphatic_system_returns_interstit: Tsarin lymph yana mayar da ruwan tsakanin sel zuwa zagayawar jini kuma yana tura selolin garkuwar jiki da aka yi a gabobin lymph. Tsarin biyu suna kiyaye homeostasis na ruwa da yaƙar kamuwa da cuta.
hausa.the_hypothalamus_bridges_the_nervous_a: Hypothalamus yana haɗa tsarin jijiya da na endocrine — yana haɗa alamun jijiya kuma yana fassara su zuwa umarnin hormone da ke sarrafa glandar pituitary da dukkan sarƙar hormone da ke ƙasa.
hausa.the_diaphragm_and_intercostal_muscles_: Diaphragm da tsokokin tsakanin haƙarƙari suna faɗaɗa da matse ramin ƙirji da jiki don motsa iska. Huhu ba su da tsoka na kansu kuma sun dogara gaba ɗaya kan tsokokin da ke kewaye.
hausa.the_skin_contains_millions_of_speciali: Fata tana ɗauke da miliyoyin ƙarshen jijiya na musamman da masu karɓa da suke gano taɓawa, matsi, zafi, da ciwo, suna ba tsarin jijiya bayanan ji koyaushe.
hausa.portal_circulation_and_nutrient_proces: Zagayawar Portal da Sarrafa Abinci mai Gina Jiki
hausa.blood_from_the_gi_tract_drains_through: Jini daga hanyar GI yana ratsawa ta jijiyar hepatic portal kai tsaye zuwa hanta kafin shiga babbar zagayawa, yana ba hanta damar sarrafa abinci mai gina jiki da kuma tsaftace guba tukuna.
hausa.bone_marrow_blood_cell_production: Ƙirƙirar Selolin Jini na Ɓargon Ƙashi
hausa.red_bone_marrow_inside_the_skeleton_is: Jan ɓargon ƙashi cikin ƙashin jiki shi ne wurin haihuwar dukkan selolin jini. Ana yin jajayen selolin jini, farin selolin jini, da platelets duka a nan ta hanyar ƙirƙirar jini.
hausa.which_structure_is_most_likely_affecte: Wane tsari ne ya fi yiwuwar shafuwa?
hausa.patellofemoral_pain_syndrome_occurs_wh: Cutar ciwon patellofemoral tana faruwa sa’ad da ƙashin gwiwa ba ya motsi da kyau a cikin hanyarsa a kan femur. Matsin lamba akai-akai daga gudu yana haddasa haushin cartilage. Magani ya haɗa da ƙarfafa quad, daidaita ƙugu, da sauya ayyuka.
hausa.which_structure_is_most_likely_torn: Wane tsari ne ya fi yiwuwar yagewa?
hausa.the_supraspinatus_is_the_most_commonly: Supraspinatus shi ne tsokar rotator cuff da ta fi yagewa akai-akai. Yana bi ƙarƙashin acromion inda yake fuskantar matsawa da yagewa. Aiki sama da kai kamar shafa fenti yana ƙara wannan haɗari sosai.
hausa.racing_heart_after_exercise: Zuciya Mai Bugawa da Sauri Bayan Motsa Jiki
hausa.which_structure_controls_the_normal_he: Wane tsari ne ke sarrafa bugun zuciya na yau da kullum?
hausa.the_sa_node_in_the_right_atrium_is_the: Node na SA a cikin atrium na dama shi ne pacemaker na dabi’a na zuciya. Lokacin motsa jiki mai ƙarfi, adrenaline na iya haddasa bugun da ba shi da illa yayin da bugun zuciya ke daidaituwa. Ya kamata a bincika arrhythmias masu ci gaba domin kawar da cutar zuciya ta tsari.
hausa.carpal_tunnel_syndrome_is_compression_: Cutar carpal tunnel ita ce matsawar jijiyar median ƙarƙashin flexor retinaculum a wuyan hannu. Jijiyar median tana ba babban yatsa da yatsu 3.5 na farko ji. Amfani da wuyan hannu akai-akai babban abin haɗari ne.
hausa.what_diagnosis_must_be_urgently_ruled_: Wace cuta ce dole a kawar da ita cikin gaggawa?
hausa.painless_lymphadenopathy_with_b_sympto: Kumburin ƙwayoyin lymph mara ciwo, tare da alamun B (gumin dare, raguwar nauyi, zazzaɓi) shi ne alamar gargajiya ta Hodgkin lymphoma a matasa. Biopsy da ke nuna selolin Reed-Sternberg yana tabbatar da ganewar cuta.
hausa.which_cells_failed_and_what_is_the_eme: Wace sel ce ta gaza, kuma menene yanayin gaggawa?
hausa.beta_cells_of_islets_of_langerhans_dia: Selolin beta na islets of Langerhans; Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
hausa.without_insulin_from_beta_cells_glucos: Ba tare da insulin daga selolin beta ba, glucose ba zai iya shiga sel ba. Jiki yana ƙona kitse, yana samar da ketones da ke sanya jini acidic. Numfashin Kussmaul yana ramawa ta fitar da CO2. Magani: ruwan IV, digon insulin, da maye electrolyte.
hausa.why_is_the_middle_third_of_the_clavicl: Me ya sa kashi na uku na tsakiya na clavicle shi ne wurin da ya fi karyewa?
hausa.the_middle_third_is_thinnest_and_has_n: Kashi na uku na tsakiya shi ne mafi sirara kuma ba shi da ƙarfafawar tsoka
hausa.the_clavicle_is_the_most_frequently_fr: Clavicle shi ne ƙashin da ya fi karyewa akai-akai. Kashi na uku na tsakiya shi ne mafi sirara kuma ba shi da kariyar tsoka. Ƙarfi daga faɗuwa a kan hannu mikakke yana taruwa a wannan wuri mai rauni. Yawancin suna warkewa da ɗaure hannu.
hausa.why_does_altitude_cause_these_symptoms: Me ya sa tsawo yana haddasa waɗannan alamu, kuma wane tsari ne ya fi fuskantar matsawa?
hausa.the_alveoli_and_respiratory_muscles_re: Alveoli da tsokokin numfashi; raguwar oxygen na sararin samaniya yana haddasa hypoxia
hausa.at_high_altitude_atmospheric_pressure_: A tsawon tudu, matsin sararin samaniya yana sauka, yana rage matsin sashe na oxygen. Ƙarancin oxygen yana ratsa bakin ganin alveoli. Jiki yana ramawa ta numfashi da sauri da zurfi, yana ƙara aikin tsokokin numfashi.
hausa.follow_a_red_blood_cell_through_the_en: Bi jan selin jini ta cikin dukkan tsarin zagayawar jini.
hausa.deoxygenated_blood_from_the_body_enter: Jinin da ba shi da oxygen daga jiki yana shiga atrium na dama ta vena cava na sama da na ƙasa.
hausa.blood_passes_through_the_tricuspid_val: Jini yana ratsawa ta bawul na tricuspid zuwa ventricle na dama, wanda ke tura shi zuwa huhu.
hausa.the_right_ventricle_ejects_blood_throu: Ventricle na dama yana fitar da jini ta bawul na pulmonary zuwa jijiyoyin pulmonary zuwa huhu biyu.
hausa.in_the_alveolar_capillaries_co2_is_rel: A cikin capillaries na alveoli, ana fitar da CO2 kuma ana ɗaukar O2 ta bakin ganin alveoli mai sirara.
hausa.freshly_oxygenated_blood_returns_to_th: Jinin da aka sabunta da oxygen yana komawa zuciya ta jijiyoyin pulmonary huɗu.
hausa.the_four_pulmonary_veins_empty_oxygena: Jijiyoyin pulmonary huɗu suna zubar da jini mai oxygen cikin atrium na hagu, wanda ke cika sannan ya tura shi ta bawul na mitral.
hausa.blood_passes_through_the_mitral_valve_: Jini yana ratsawa ta bawul na mitral zuwa ventricle na hagu mai tsoka, ɗakin da ya fi ƙarfi na zuciya.
hausa.the_left_ventricle_powerfully_ejects_b: Ventricle na hagu yana fitar da jini da ƙarfi ta bawul na aorta zuwa aorta, babbar hanyar jiki.
hausa.arteries_branch_into_arterioles_and_ca: Jijiyoyi suna rarrabuwa zuwa arterioles da capillaries inda ake kai O2 da abinci mai gina jiki da tattara CO2/shara.
hausa.deoxygenated_blood_returns_through_ven: Jinin da ba shi da oxygen yana komawa ta venules da jijiyoyi, tare da taimakon famfunan tsoka da bawuloli, zuwa atrium na dama.
hausa.trace_the_journey_of_a_breath_of_air_f: Bi tafiyar numfashin iska daga hanci zuwa alveoli da dawowa.
hausa.air_enters_through_the_nostrils_and_is: Iska tana shiga ta hancuka kuma ana ɗumama ta, ana sanya mata danshi, ana tace ta ta membranes na gamji da turbinates.
hausa.air_passes_through_the_nasopharynx_and: Iska tana ratsawa ta nasopharynx da oropharynx, hanya da aka raba da hanyar narkewa.
hausa.air_crosses_the_vocal_cords_in_the_voi: Iska tana ƙetare igiyoyin murya a maƙoshin murya. Epiglottis yana kariya daga abinci shiga hanyar iska.
hausa.the_trachea_windpipe_is_reinforced_by_: Ƙwarƙwaron numfashi yana ƙarfafuwa da zoban cartilage masu siffar C. Cilia suna motsa gamji sama don kama datti.
hausa.the_trachea_splits_into_left_and_right: Ƙwarƙwaron numfashi yana rarrabuwa zuwa manyan bronchi na hagu da dama, kowanne yana shiga huhu ɗaya. Suna rarrabuwa zuwa ƙananan bronchioles.
hausa.300_million_grape_like_sacs_where_gas_: Jakunkuna miliyan 300 masu kama da inabi inda ake yin musayar iska. O2 yana yaɗuwa cikin jini; CO2 yana yaɗuwa waje. Fadin farfajiya daidai yake da filin wasan tennis.
hausa.the_diaphragm_relaxes_and_rises_reduci: Diaphragm yana huce ya hau, yana rage girman huhu. Iska mai yawan CO2 ana turawa waje ta hanya ɗaya a baya.
hausa.follow_a_meal_from_mouth_through_the_e: Bi abinci daga baki ta cikin dukkan tsarin narkewa.
hausa.teeth_mechanically_break_food_down_sal: Haƙora suna niƙa abinci ta hanyar inji. Amylase na miyau yana fara narkar da sitaci. Harshe yana sassaƙa abinci zuwa bolus.
hausa.swallowing_pushes_the_bolus_past_the_e: Haɗiyewa yana tura bolus ya wuce epiglottis. Raƙuman peristaltic suna motsa shi ƙasa ta esophagus mai tsawon cm 25 cikin kimanin daƙiƙa 8.
hausa.gastric_acid_ph_1_5_3_5_and_pepsin_bre: Acid na ciki (pH 1.5-3.5) da pepsin suna rarraba sunadarai. Juyawa yana samar da chyme cikin awa 2-4.
hausa.the_first_25cm_of_the_small_intestine_: Cm 25 na farko na ƙananan hanji yana karɓar bile daga hanta/gallbladder da enzymes daga pancreas.
hausa.most_nutrient_absorption_occurs_here_v: Yawancin shan abinci mai gina jiki yana faruwa a nan ta villi da microvilli, suna ƙara fadin farfajiya sau 600. Tsawon mita 6-7.
hausa.water_and_electrolytes_are_reabsorbed_: Ana sake shan ruwa da electrolytes. Ƙwayoyin cutar hanji suna dahuwar fiber da ya rage, suna samar da bitamin K da B12.
hausa.waste_is_compacted_and_stored_in_the_r: Ana matsa shara a adana ta a dubura har sai bayan gari. Dukkan tafiya tana ɗaukar awa 24-72.
hausa.trace_a_reflex_arc_from_stimulus_to_re: Bi baka na reflex daga abin haddasawa zuwa amsa.
hausa.a_sensory_receptor_in_the_skin_detects: Mai karɓar ji a fata (kamar taɓa saman mai zafi) yana gano abin haddasa ciwo kuma yana samar da alamar lantarki.
hausa.the_signal_travels_along_a_sensory_aff: Alama tana tafiya ta jijiyar ji (afferent) zuwa kashin baya da sauri har 120 m/s ta hanyar tafiyar saltatory.
hausa.in_the_dorsal_horn_the_sensory_neuron_: A ƙahon baya, jijiyar ji tana yin synapse da interneuron. Don reflex, alama ba ta buƙatar kaiwa ƙwaƙwalwa.
hausa.the_interneuron_in_the_spinal_gray_mat: Interneuron a cikin launin toka na kashin baya yana haɗa alama kuma yana mika ta ga jijiyar motsi.
hausa.the_motor_efferent_neuron_carries_the_: Jijiyar motsi (efferent) tana ɗaukar alamar umarni daga ƙahon gaba zuwa tsokar da aka nufa.
hausa.acetylcholine_released_at_the_neuromus: Acetylcholine da aka fitar a mahaɗar jijiya da tsoka yana haddasa matsewar tsoka. Ka ja hannunka baya kafin ka ji ciwo.
hausa.meanwhile_a_copy_of_the_signal_ascends: A sa’i ɗaya, kwafin alama yana hawa zuwa bawon ji na jiki. Kana jin ciwo da sani kimanin daƙiƙa 0.5 bayan reflex.
hausa.sorry_i_could_not_connect_to_the_ai_tu: Yi haƙuri, ban iya haɗawa da malamin AI a yanzu ba.
hausa.ai_tutor_is_not_available_in_this_envi: Malamin AI ba ya samuwa a wannan yanayi.
hausa.click_any_organ_to_see_its_structure_f: Danna kowace gaɓa don ganin tsarinta, aikinta, da haɗe-haɗenta. Zura don samun lakabi masu sauƙi; taɓa don cikakken bayani.
hausa.step_through_each_major_part_in_pedago: Bi kowane babban sashe cikin tsari na koyarwa. Hanya mafi kyau ga masu koyo a karo na farko — tana ɗauke da tsari → aiki → haɗawa a wucewa ɗaya.
hausa.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Babu tsarin da ke aiki shi kaɗai. Ƙoda tana tace jini (zuciya da jijiyoyi), tana amsa ADH (endocrine), tana fitar da urea (samfurin narkewa). Nemo haɗe-haɗen.
hausa.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Yi tambaya game da gaɓa ko tsari mai aiki. Malami ya san abin da ke kan allo kuma yana daidaita amsoshi ga matakin ajinka.
hausa.click_the_named_structure_on_the_diagr: Danna tsarin da aka ambata a zane. Yana gina saurin danna-abu da jarrabawar AP da ta likita ke dogara akai.
hausa.follow_blood_air_food_or_signals_throu: Bi jini, iska, abinci, ko alamu cikin jiki cikin tsari. Hanyoyi ne suke sa gaskiya keɓaɓɓe ta zama tsarin da za ka iya tunani a kai.
hausa.quick_recall_cards_with_spaced_repetit: Kati na tunawa da sauri masu maimaitawa mai tazara. Bitar daƙiƙa shida yanzu ta fi sake karatun minti biyar gobe — wannan shi ne tasirin gwaji.
hausa.adjust_the_sliders_to_keep_each_body_v: Daidaita sliders don kiyaye kowane canjin jiki cikin matakinsa mai kyau, ka kalli yadda tsaruka ke aiki tare don kiyaye daidaito.
hausa.reset_all_layers_to_default_skin_only: Sake saita dukkan yadudduka zuwa asali (fata kaɗai)
hausa.switch_between_male_and_female_reprodu: Canja tsakanin jikin haihuwa na namiji da mace
hausa.exception_the_pulmonary_artery_carries: Banda: jijiyar pulmonary tana ɗaukar jinin da ba shi da oxygen (shuɗi), jijiyoyin pulmonary suna ɗaukar jinin mai oxygen (ja).
hausa.which_structure_has_this_function: Wane tsari ne ke da wannan aiki?
hausa.which_body_system_contains_this_struct: Wane tsarin jiki ne ke ɗauke da wannan tsari?
hausa.no_quiz_questions_available: Babu tambayoyin jarrabawa da suke samuwa.
hausa.anatomy_data_table: tebur na bayanan jikin ɗan adam
hausa.no_structures_match_your_search: Babu gine-ginen da suka dace da bincikenka.
hausa.ai_anatomy_tutor: 🤖 Malamin Jikin Ɗan Adam na AI
hausa.ask_a_question_about_anatomy_to_get_st: Yi tambaya game da jikin ɗan adam don farawa!
hausa.ask_the_anatomy_ai_tutor_a_question: Yi wa malamin jikin ɗan adam na AI tambaya
hausa.no_tour_available_for_this_system: Babu yawon da yake samuwa ga wannan tsari.
hausa.anatomy_spotter_test: 🎯 Gwajin Mai Gano Jikin Ɗan Adam
hausa.a_pin_is_placed_on_the_anatomical_figu: An sanya fil a kan siffar jiki. Gano tsarin da sauri yadda za ka iya! Nemo crosshair mai bugawa a kanvas.
hausa.what_structure_is_marked_on_the_figure: Wane tsari ne aka yi masa alama a siffar?
hausa.trace_step_by_step_how_blood_flows_air: Bi mataki-mataki yadda jini ke gudana, iska ke motsi, abinci ke narkewa, ko alamun jijiya ke tafiya cikin jiki.
hausa.no_flashcards_available_for_this_compl: Babu kati da suke samuwa ga wannan matakin wahala.
hausa.normal_homeostasis_maintained: 🟢 Na yau da kullum — an kiyaye homeostasis
hausa.all_vital_signs_within_physiologic_ran: Dukkan muhimman alamu suna cikin matakin ilimin halittar jiki.
hausa.mild_stress_feedback_engaged: 🟡 Ƙaramar damuwa — an fara mayar da martani
hausa.compensatory_mechanisms_activated_body: An kunna hanyoyin ramawa. Jiki yana maido da matakan asali.
hausa.multiple_systems_strained_risk_of_deco: An damƙe tsaruka da yawa. Haɗarin gazawa.
hausa.critical_life_threatening: 🔴 Mai muhimmanci — mai barazana ga rai
hausa.acid_base_glucose_thermal_disturbance_: Rikicewar acid-base + glucose + zafi ya wuce ƙarfin ramawa.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_which_vital_sign_: Hasashe (rubutu na kyauta): Wace muhimmiyar alama ce ke jure wa canji mafi ƙanƙanta?
hausa.hold_two_vital_signs_steady_move_the_t: Riƙe muhimman alamu biyu tsayayye. Motsa na uku. Kalli.
hausa.real_human_ph_range_is_7_35_7_45_inves: Ainihin matakin pH na ɗan adam shi ne 7.35-7.45. Bincika me ya sa ya yi ƙunci sosai.
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_critical_s: Nemo saituna biyu masu samar da yanayi mai muhimmanci. Me suke da shi tare?
hausa.explain_why_homeostasis_is_fragile_to_: Bayyana dalilin da ya sa homeostasis ke da rauni ga canjin masu canji da yawa.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_vital_mar: Bayanin ƙira: alamar muhimmi na yanayi 4 daban; babu makin asibiti; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
